Columns.Name: グループ既定値優先フラグ
既存建物旧計算方法フラグ
解析時見積添付フラグ
液状化判定必要フラグ
改良判定時基礎図必要フラグ
保証書原本郵送フラグ
付保証明書必要フラグ
アイダ設計フローフラグ
調査データ添付フラグ
見積書提出必須フラグ
見積通知住宅事業者不要フラグ
判定書自動送信非対応フラグ
保証書自動発行非対応フラグ

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT main.group_id AS "グループID",
    main.customer_id AS "顧客ID",
    sub.group_default_priority_flg AS "グループ既定値優先フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.existing_object_oldcalculate_flg
            ELSE suba.existing_object_oldcalculate_flg
        END AS "既存建物旧計算方法フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.delivery_file_format
            ELSE suba.delivery_file_format
        END AS "納品ファイル形式",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.construction_estimate_set_flg
            ELSE suba.construction_estimate_set_flg
        END AS "解析時見積添付フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.study_paper_request_flg
            ELSE suba.study_paper_request_flg
        END AS "検討書必要フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.liquefaction_assessment_flg
            ELSE suba.liquefaction_assessment_flg
        END AS "液状化判定必要フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.specify_compaction_customer_id
            ELSE suba.specify_compaction_customer_id
        END AS "指定転圧会社ID",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.no_compaction_judge_flg
            ELSE suba.no_compaction_judge_flg
        END AS "転圧判定不可フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.no_compaction_estimate_flg
            ELSE suba.no_compaction_estimate_flg
        END AS "転圧見積不要フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.comaction_other_construction_flg
            ELSE suba.comaction_other_construction_flg
        END AS "転圧他社施工フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.compaction_re_survey_flg
            ELSE suba.compaction_re_survey_flg
        END AS "転圧再調査フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.surplus_soil_disposal_flg
            ELSE suba.surplus_soil_disposal_flg
        END AS "残土処分フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.no_construction_estimate_flg
            ELSE suba.no_construction_estimate_flg
        END AS "工事見積不要フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.construction_cotract_flg
            ELSE suba.construction_cotract_flg
        END AS "工事請負フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.foundation_diagram_need_flg
            ELSE suba.foundation_diagram_need_flg
        END AS "改良判定時基礎図必要フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.warranty_period
            ELSE suba.warranty_period
        END AS "既定保証期間",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.warranty_period_specify_flg
            ELSE suba.warranty_period_specify_flg
        END AS "保証期間指定フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.specify_warranty_period
            ELSE suba.specify_warranty_period
        END AS "指定保証期間s",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.warranty_mailing_flg
            ELSE suba.warranty_mailing_flg
        END AS "保証書原本郵送フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.mailing_commission_flg
            ELSE suba.mailing_commission_flg
        END AS "郵送手数料フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.mailing_method_id
            ELSE suba.mailing_method_id
        END AS "郵送方法ID",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.insurance_certificate_need_flg
            ELSE suba.insurance_certificate_need_flg
        END AS "付保証明書必要フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subc.warranty_additional_notes
            ELSE suba.warranty_additional_notes
        END AS "保証追記事項",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subd.aida_flow_flg
            ELSE subb.aida_flow_flg
        END AS "アイダ設計フローフラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subd.exception_prefectures
            ELSE subb.exception_prefectures
        END AS "例外都道府県s",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.group_default_priority_flg = 1) AND (sub.group_type_id <> 1)) THEN subd.survey_data_attachment_flg
            ELSE subb.survey_data_attachment_flg
        END AS "調査データ添付フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.estimate_attachment_required_flag = 1) THEN sub.estimate_attachment_required_flag
            ELSE subb.estimate_attachment_required_flag
        END AS "見積書提出必須フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.estimate_notification_builder_not_required_flg = 1) AND (main.construction_estimate_builder_notice_flg = 0)) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS "見積通知住宅事業者不要フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.auto_send_unsupported_flg = 1) OR (subb.auto_send_unsupported_flg = 1)) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS "判定書自動送信非対応フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.auto_warranty_issue_unsupported_flg = 1) OR (subb.auto_warranty_issue_unsupported_flg = 1)) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS "保証書自動発行非対応フラグ"
   FROM (((((m_customer_group main
     JOIN m_group sub ON ((main.group_id = sub.group_id)))
     JOIN m_customer_default suba ON ((main.customer_id = suba.customer_id)))
     JOIN m_customer_settings subb ON ((main.customer_id = subb.customer_id)))
     LEFT JOIN m_customer_default subc ON ((sub.customer_id = subc.customer_id)))
     LEFT JOIN m_customer_settings subd ON ((sub.customer_id = subd.customer_id)));
